titles.en: Chapter 68 – Applying clay to the grave, and plastering it
Chapter 68 – Applying clay to the grave, and plastering it

segments: لَا تُطَيِّنُوا الْقَبْرَ مِنْ غَيْرِ طِينِهِ .
arabic.text: لَا تُطَيِّنُوا الْقَبْرَ مِنْ غَيْرِ طِينِهِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do not apply clay on the grave from other than its own clay’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do not apply clay on the grave from other than its own clay’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from af-Nawfafiy from af-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not apply clay to the grave which is not of the clay of that grave.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from af-Nawfafiy from af-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must not apply clay to the grave which is not of the clay of that grave.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/116)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/116)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 68 – Applying clay to the grave, and plastering it

segments: قَبْرُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مُحَصَّبٌ حَصْبَاءَ حَمْرَاءَ .
arabic.text: قَبْرُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) مُحَصَّبٌ حَصْبَاءَ حَمْرَاءَ .

segments: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad, from someone else, from one of his companions,
from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The grave of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was pebbly, of red gravel’.
en.hubeali.text:
Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad, from someone else, from one of his companions,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The grave of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was pebbly, of red gravel’.

segments: 2. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad from more than one person from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The grave of the Messenger of Allah is covered with red color pebbles.”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Muhammad from more than one person from certain persons of his people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The grave of the Messenger of Allah is covered with red color pebbles.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/117)
gradings.label: مرسل
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/117)

narratorChain.raw: حُمَيْدُ بْنُ زِيَادٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ غَيْرِ وَاحِدٍ عَنْ بَعْضِ أَصْحَابِهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 68 – Applying clay to the grave, and plastering it

segments: لَمَّا رَجَعَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ بَغْدَادَ وَ مَضَى إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ مَاتَتْ لَهُ ابْنَةٌ بِفَيْدَ فَدَفَنَهَا وَ أَمَرَ بَعْضَ مَوَالِيهِ أَنْ يُجَصِّصَ قَبْرَهَا وَ يَكْتُبَ عَلَى لَوْحٍ اسْمَهَا وَ يَجْعَلَهُ فِي الْقَبْرِ .
arabic.text: لَمَّا رَجَعَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) مِنْ بَغْدَادَ وَ مَضَى إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ مَاتَتْ لَهُ ابْنَةٌ بِفَيْدَ فَدَفَنَهَا وَ أَمَرَ بَعْضَ مَوَالِيهِ أَنْ يُجَصِّصَ قَبْرَهَا وَ يَكْتُبَ عَلَى لَوْحٍ اسْمَهَا وَ يَجْعَلَهُ فِي الْقَبْرِ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,

‘When Abu Al Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> returned from Baghdad and went to Al Medina, and daughter of his<sup>asws</sup> died. So he<sup>asws</sup> buried her and ordered one of his<sup>asws</sup> slaves that he should apply clay on her grave and write her name upon a tombstone, and make it to be in her grave’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,

‘When Abu Al Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> returned from Baghdad and went to Al Medina, and daughter of his<sup>asws</sup> died. So he<sup>asws</sup> buried her and ordered one of his<sup>asws</sup> slaves that he should apply clay on her grave and write her name upon a tombstone, and make it to be in her grave’.

segments: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad ibn Mahbub from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “When abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, returned from Baghdad to al-Madinah, one of his daughters died in Fayd. He (the Imam) buried her and commanded certain people of his followers to build her grave with lime, write her name on the tombstone and place it on the grave.”
en.sarwar.text: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad ibn Mahbub from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “When abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, returned from Baghdad to al-Madinah, one of his daughters died in Fayd. He (the Imam) buried her and commanded certain people of his followers to build her grave with lime, write her name on the tombstone and place it on the grave.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/117)
gradings.label: ضعيف
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/117)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ زِيَادٍ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter 68 – Applying clay to the grave, and plastering it

segments: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) نَهَى أَنْ يُزَادَ عَلَى الْقَبْرِ تُرَابٌ لَمْ يُخْرَجْ مِنْهُ .
arabic.text: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) نَهَى أَنْ يُزَادَ عَلَى الْقَبْرِ تُرَابٌ لَمْ يُخْرَجْ مِنْهُ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,
from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> forbade to increase upon the grave, soil which did not come out from it’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> forbade to increase upon the grave, soil which did not come out from it’.

segments: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Holy prophet prohibited adding of such soil into the grave which has not come from that grave.’”
en.sarwar.text: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Holy prophet prohibited adding of such soil into the grave which has not come from that grave.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/117)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/117)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ النَّوْفَلِيِّ عَنِ السَّكُونِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام )
